name: Agents cannot read credential stores directly
description: AI agents are denied direct read access to credential stores, secret vaults, .env files, keychain entries, and any resource that resolves to a plaintext secret. Agents must request credentials via an intermediary that returns presence confirmation, not values.

policy.rationale: An agent that can read credentials can exfiltrate them — either intentionally through prompt injection or accidentally by including them in a response. Intermediary-only access prevents this class of leak.
